benefits.description: Mild appetite suppression lasting 2-3 days per dose, now reduced to 1-2 days; reduction in food noise
A1C dropped by approximately 0.75, now in normal range

protocol_notes: OP lost 40 lbs on Tirzepatide but has plateaued for ~3 months still 70 lbs from goal. Appetite suppression effectiveness declining significantly. Recently split dose to 8mg every 5 days hoping to improve efficacy. Eats one meal a day (dinner), targets under 1500 cal/day. On heart rate medication which limits options for adding Retatrutide. Pre-diabetic status resolved per recent physical. Asking about adding Retatrutide or Cagrilintide.
